DISCOVERY 612, AFTER HEARING, DEFENDANT WEST COAST OUTDOOR MEDIA, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND FOR SANCTIONS IS MOOT AS RESPONSES HAVE BEEN SERVED. THE COURT WILL NOT DETERMINE ADEQUACY OF THOSE RESPONSES ON THIS MOTION. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED TO DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $500.00 TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions;
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brendan Hallinan, Esq., for defendant and moving party: West Coast Outdoor Media
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., for Plaintiff and Opposing party: Posner Advertising

After Hearing, Defendant West Coast OUtdoor Media, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For Sanctions is MOOT as responses have been served. The court will not determine adequacy of those responses on this motion. Sanctions are awarded to Defendant in the amount of $500.00 to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
